title: athyrium griffithii
intro: Athyrium griffithii, also known as Griffith's Lady Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus. It is native to the Himalayan region and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Athyrium griffithii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
